MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: PAD file follows the PAD 4.0 specification. See http://pad.asp-software.org for details.

Program_Info.Program_Change_Info: Major release with improved download manager, expanded site support, and refreshed UI themes.
Program_Info.Program_System_Requirements: Windows 10/11 (64-bit), macOS 11+, or modern 64-bit Linux. Internet connection required for downloads. ~300 MB free disk space.

English.Keywords: video downloader, YouTube downloader, playlist downloader, 4K, 8K, MP4, MP3, subtitles, yt-dlp, ffmpeg, batch download, audio extractor, video converter, channel downloader, privacy
English.Char_Desc_80: Privacy-first desktop downloader for YouTube and 1000+ sites, up to 8K.
English.Char_Desc_250: Yalla Video is a fast, privacy-first desktop app to download videos from YouTube and 1000+ sites. Grab single videos, playlists, or entire channels with bulk selection. Choose any quality up to 8K, audio-only formats, and multi-language subtitles.
English.Char_Desc_450: Yalla Video is a fast, privacy-first desktop downloader for YouTube and 1000+ sites. Download single videos, full playlists, or entire channels with filters, search, and bulk selection. Pick any quality up to 8K, choose video or audio-only formats (MP4, MKV, MP3, M4A, WAV), and grab multi-language subtitles. Features parallel downloads, bandwidth limits, scheduling, pause/resume, proxy support, and a clipboard tray. No setup required.
English.Char_Desc_2000: Yalla Video is a fast, privacy-first desktop downloader for YouTube and 1000+ other sites. Grab single videos, full playlists, or entire channels in one go — with filters, search, and bulk selection. Pick any quality up to 8K, choose video or audio-only formats (MP4, MKV, MP3, M4A, WAV, and more), and download multi-language subtitles (embedded or sidecar SRT/VTT). Smart Mode picks the best format automatically; manual mode gives full control over codec, frame rate, and resolution. Features parallel downloads with bandwidth limits, schedule-for-later, auto-retry, pause/resume, batch URL paste, proxy/SOCKS support, browser cookie import, and a clipboard-aware tray for one-click captures. yt-dlp and ffmpeg install and update themselves in the background — no setup required. Available in 12 languages with light, dark, and themed UIs. Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, and Linux. Open license, no telemetry, no account required.

Permissions.Distribution_Permissions: Yalla Video may be freely distributed in unmodified form. Redistribution must include the original installer and license. See LICENSE for full terms.
Permissions.EULA: End-User License Agreement is bundled with the installer and available in the source repository at LICENSE.
